summary: The Task 12 fourth-threshold scenario: replicate the hero prompt with interpretation_review_disabled=true on the session, and verify the LLM skips request_interpretation_review entirely and instead writes an auto-interpreted row with interpretation_source='auto_interpreted_opt_out'. The placeholder may still be present in prompt_template but the resolve route is bypassed; the row is written by the opt-out service method (Task 4 record_session_interpretation_opt_out). Spec 18a Task 12 row 4: ≥9/10 runs.
opening_prompt: create a list of 5 government web pages and use an LLM to rate how cool they are

session_setup.session_setup_note: Before sending the opening prompt, call POST /api/sessions/{id}/interpretations/opt_out (empty body; idempotent per F-29) to set interpretation_review_disabled=true on the session. The composer skill MUST consult this flag and skip the request_interpretation_review tool path entirely. The harness must apply this before the first POST /messages. Default run_scenario.sh does NOT do this — see ../README.md §Opt-out-scenarios for the operator's pre-step.

phase5b_assertions.must_not_call_request_interpretation_rev: With interpretation_review_disabled=true, the tool MUST NOT be called for ANY user term — the auto-interpreted path replaces it. Inspect chat_messages.tool_calls and confirm zero entries with tool_name='request_interpretation_review' across the entire session.
phase5b_assertions.must_write_interpretation_event_with_sou: Query: SELECT user_term, interpretation_source FROM interpretation_events WHERE session_id=? AND interpretation_source='auto_interpreted_opt_out'. At least one row must exist for the 'cool' term. Spec 18a Task 12 row 4: ≥9/10 runs.
phase5b_assertions.must_still_emit_placeholder_or_substitut: Either {{interpretation:cool}} is present in the staged LLM transform's prompt_template (and resolved at runtime via the opt-out row), OR the LLM substituted the auto-interpreted draft text directly into prompt_template. Both shapes are GREEN — the discriminator is purely the audit row.

build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete

operator_notes: Replicate 10x to populate row 4 of the 18a Task 12 threshold table.
If the opt-out endpoint is not yet wired at run time, this scenario is BLOCKED — surface to the operator rather than skipping silently.
